# init(identifier:)

**Initializer**

Returns a new configuration that is persistent and unique for the specified identifier.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor convenience init(identifier: UUID)
```

## Discussion

If a [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtensionController] is associated with a unique persistent configuration, data will be written to the file system in a unique location based on the specified identifier.

## Related Documentation

- **default()**: Returns a new default configuration that is persistent and not unique.
